ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_venue" TEXT /* Home venue of the team */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the team */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the match was played */,
  "result_string" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team A won by 10 runs) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Winner of the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, bowl) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "batting_position" INTEGER /* Batting position of the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player */,
  "overs" REAL /* Overs bowled by the player */,
  "fielding_performance" TEXT /* Fielding performance of the player (e.g., catches taken, run-outs affected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue (number of spectators) */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Location coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* Profile picture URL of the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser type and version of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_captains" (
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each captain */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the captain leads */,
  "captain_start_date" TEXT /* Date the captain started leading the team */,
  "captain_end_date" TEXT /* Date the captain ended leading the team */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the captain in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("captain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_captains_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach works for */,
  "coach_start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started working for the team */,
  "coach_end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended working for the team */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Coaching experience of the coach in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
